title: 【伊瑟】芙蕾雅T0辅助养成智壳源器全方位攻略解析

Height":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"由于完美晶格非常稀缺，所以我们点满1技能就可以了，不仅可以提升速度，还能提高我们的拉条推条效果","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"table","key":"lyHQ0UFTIliBhvLp","width":"200px","children":[{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"技能","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"推荐等级","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"1技能","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"Lv.5","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"2技能","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"Lv.1","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]},{"type":"table-row","children":[{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"3技能","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]},{"type":"table-cell","bgColor":"","width":"100px","children":[{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"Lv.1","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]}]}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"text":"3.2智壳源器推荐","color":"","fontSize":"13.5pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" "},{"type":"image","key":"U7YnJl5jLGsaRqD3","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1328/h_1328/50364/842288/2025/7/27/853542.jpeg","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"532px","height":"532px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":"为大家制作了一图流智壳源器推荐，12疾驰是必须的，后期有2种玩法一种是辅助高速增益队友，一种是启示录多段输出高速打速攻。这个版本由于启示录在pvp中被削弱所以推荐玩高速胡狼辅助流就好。","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"text":"3.3属性权重推荐","color":"","fontSize":"13.5pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"源器的左三主属性固定，副属性速度越高越好","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"右三主属性，我推荐2命中效果+1生命加成，保证技能附加上debuff的情况下增加一点生存能力，下面是芙蕾雅的属性参考：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"left","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1334/h_975/50364/2025/8/27/5584bb57-2ff6-4477-8e70-0d4f18a0b91cpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"522px","height":"382px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"12pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"智壳属性推荐：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_438/h_189/50364/2025/8/27/d323164b-ccd5-432d-b8e0-cf58dac28fb9png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"262px","height":"113px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"涌流提升生成能力，讯影提升速度，凝视保证长线战斗技能附加debuff概率提升","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header2","children":[{"text":"四、阵容搭配","color":"","fontSize":"18pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"text":"4.1泛用场景","color":"","fontSize":"13.5pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅很多副本都可以打，属于是万金油的存在，例如以下副本：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_876/h_433/50364/2025/8/27/7a4f8ec1-bd3b-4171-8d60-a8f2ebb1d4a9png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"383px","height":"190px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"重构兵祸地狱4之前都可以打（包括地狱4）","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_884/h_434/50364/2025/8/27/cfbfaff1-4782-4305-8412-111d0b51042apng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"386px","height":"190px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1384/h_444/50364/2025/8/27/9d963547-22f4-4e6f-9df1-b6687b64f588png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"604px","height":"194px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"各种副本都有芙蕾雅发挥的空间，不知道怎么组队塞一个芙蕾雅进去准没错","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header3","children":[{"text":"4.2协同体系","color":"","fontSize":"13.5pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"推荐芙蕾雅的黄金组合克洛斯","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_460/h_469/50364/2025/8/27/7a2210c9-dfd2-412b-9e5b-4e68aa1f745epng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"259px","height":"264px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"克洛斯技能附加3减益完美触发芙蕾雅的被动，以下是推荐的芙蕾雅队伍泛用的模板：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1268/h_493/50364/2025/8/27/a69748ad-903e-4b58-be70-d45c2134c274png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"554px","height":"216px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"队伍每个位置完美发挥自己的作用，在打其他副本时可根据实际情况微调","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"header2","children":[{"text":"五、抽卡规划","color":"","fontSize":"18pt","bold":true,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"新手推荐先抽常驻池200-300抽，常驻池也包含了芙蕾雅，并且常驻池出货率高，先抽常驻池，如果实在没抽到，前期开荒又需要，那我们再来到up池抽卡","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]
